title: The Detailed Design Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential and iterative process of creating a detailed UI/UX design, from component definition to final handoff.
relationships: The process begins with establishing a library of reusable components, which are then assembled into high-fidelity mockups. These mockups are used to create an interactive prototype for user testing and validation. Based on feedback, detailed specifications are written. The final, validated design is then handed off to the development team for implementation.
